goals.title: Continue ParentPick Guard Codex Plugin hardening for the mini-Ralphth...
goals.objective: Continue ParentPick Guard Codex Plugin hardening for the mini-Ralphthon in D:\KLab\workspace\2026-06-07-harness. Constraints: PowerShell 7 only; work only inside repo; do not commit directly; do not mark final completion until user explicitly says finish. Immediate quality target: verify and fix cleanup correctness for PowerShell verifier so .codex-temp validation artifacts are removed, malformed-input failures leave no stale outputs, and docs/evidence record the result.

successCriteria.scenario: CLI channel: from repo root run PowerShell command that removes .codex-temp if it exists, executes pwsh -NoProfile -File .\plugins\parentpick-guard\scripts\Test-ParentPickGuard.ps1, captures stdout/stderr, then asserts .codex-temp does not exist. PASS iff verifier exits 0 and the transcript contains TEMP_CLEANUP_PASS.

CLI channel: from repo root run PowerShell malformed-input check that seeds a stale .codex-temp\parentpick-guard-validation\blank-report-title.html file, runs pwsh -NoProfile -File .\plugins\parentpick-guard\scripts\Test-ParentPickGuard.ps1, then asserts the stale output is absent after the expected generator failure. PASS iff transcript contains STALE_OUTPUT_CLEANUP_PASS and verifier exits 0.

CLI channel: from repo root run pwsh -NoProfile -File .\plugins\parentpick-guard\scripts\Test-ParentPickGuardEvidence.ps1 and inspect generated report/assets. PASS iff transcript contains evidence replay PASS markers, docs/RUN_LOG.md mentions cleanup hardening, and generated sample report plus demo screenshot paths still exist.

codexObjective: Complete the durable ulw-loop plan in .omo/ulw-loop/019ea0b7-c7e4-7ff1-b09f-b3f48d1fb752/goals.json, including later accepted/appended stories, under the original brief constraints; use .omo/ulw-loop/019ea0b7-c7e4-7ff1-b09f-b3f48d1fb752/ledger.jsonl as the audit trail.
